description: May and Elena arrive outside Afterlife, quickly encountering Kora, who is running away from Li and Gordon. They try to request an audience with Jiaying and are promptly secured and brought before her. Elena explains her predicament and pleads for help, while May negotiates with Jiaying and Li to gain their trust.

transcript.line: Kora! Kora, stop! You can't outrun Gordon!
Please. Don't bring me back there.
Take her home.
What about them?
Who the hell are you?
We're here to see Jiaying. I need to...
Secure them.
You shouldn't have come here.
How did you know my name?
I was told to find you. My name is Elena. I'm an Inhuman. I need your help.
You're an Inhuman? How?
You're not the only ones with Terrigen crystals.
If you have a gift, show us.
That's the problem. I used to be fast. I could run long distances in a single heartbeat. But I was poisoned. And now I just... I freeze in place.
How convenient. Maybe after a few days here, you'll stop lying.
[Speaking Chinese]
[Speaking Chinese]
[Speaking Chinese]
[Speaking Chinese]
This is a Diviner. Humans die if they touch it. But Inhum...
Oh. It's a prosthetic.
It's settled, then. We'll do what we can for you.
You're really gonna help them? These intruders?
I know it's your job to worry about everything, but you need to calm down.
We're leaving ourselves exposed. They're a danger to us.
Something took away her gift. If that's really possible, then I need to know how. The safety of our people depends on it.
Fine. Learn what you can. But you have to realize that when you're done... they can't be allowed to leave.
